reason: The remediation involves modifying the GRUB2 bootloader configuration and regenerating the boot configuration file (grub.cfg). Any error in the bootloader configuration or the grub2-mkconfig process can lead to a non-bootable system, requiring physical or console access for recovery.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Potential for system boot failure; Risk of misconfiguring bootloader parameters; Requires manual verification of bootloader integrity
